reason: Settings UI and frontend release-facing text changes live in the frontend layer.
Settings page edits should follow existing component composition and UI behavior conventions.
Keep the M1 toggle/default-value change minimal and aligned with frontend quality expectations.
Version and settings changes touch typed frontend state and should preserve existing type safety.
Release version bump also touches Tauri/backend-owned metadata files; backend spec index gives the layer map.
Version metadata updates should remain minimal and consistent with backend quality rules.
